title: Base pool going live soon!
html:
<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 font-exo">The Next Chapter: DeHub is Launching on Base!</h2> <p class="mb-4 text-lg text-royal-blue/80">Get ready, DeHubbers! The moment many of you have been waiting for is almost here. We are thrilled to announce that DeHub will be deploying on Uniswap on the Base network imminently.</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">This strategic move marks a significant milestone for our project, opening up a world of possibilities within Base's fast, low-cost, and developer-friendly Ethereum L2 ecosystem. We're excited to bring more liquidity, accessibility, and utility to the DeHub token and our community.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">Official Base Contract</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">For everyone wanting to get prepared, here is the official DeHub token contract address on the Base network:</p> <div class="bg-sky-blue/10 p-4 rounded-lg my-4 overflow-x-auto border border-sky-blue/20"> <a href="https://basescan.org/token/0xD20ab1015f6a2De4a6FdDEbAB270113F689c2F7c" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="text-sm font-mono text-middle-blue break-all hover:underline">0xD20ab1015f6a2De4a6FdDEbAB270113F689c2F7c</a> </div> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">We encourage you to add this to your wallet and verify it on <a href="https://basescan.org/token/0xD20ab1015f6a2De4a6FdDEbAB270113F689c2F7c" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="text-middle-blue hover:underline font-semibold">Basescan</a>.</p>

<h3 class="text-xl font-bold mt-8 mb-4 font-exo">Bridge to Base for FREE!</h3> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">To celebrate our launch and make your transition seamless, we've established a simple and free bridging mechanism. You can migrate your tokens from other networks to Base effortlessly.</p> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Simply send your tokens to this dedicated bridging address:</p> <div class="bg-sky-blue/10 p-4 rounded-lg my-4 overflow-x-auto border border-sky-blue/20"> <code class="text-sm font-mono text-middle-blue break-all">0x11D79aE9a0F8a8f9Fcf5BE71e403ed203EC2394d</code> </div> <p class="mb-4 text-royal-blue/80">Tokens sent to this address will be automatically burned on the origin chain and re-minted for you on the Base network. No fees, no hassle.</p>

<p class="mt-8 font-semibold text-royal-blue">This is just the beginning. Stay tuned for the official announcement when the Uniswap pool goes live. We're incredibly excited for this next chapter and couldn't have done it without our amazing community!</p>
